title: Bleeding
description: This mod introduces a bleeding mechanic into the game, adding a new layer of danger and immersion.
body:
![bleeding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bf47da3bdf92013b8d1f385db20db1653968318.png)

[![alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62e912cff53efa8f834c7922ddfb7442809cca81.png "Curseforge")](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bleeding-system)

This mod introduces a bleeding mechanic into the game, adding a new layer of danger and immersion.
It is my first modding project, and it is still a work in progress with many aspects left to improve.

I hope this mod will be useful and enjoyable for players.
You are free to use it in modpacks.

# **Bleeding system**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Bleeding is a new effect applied to the player when they break glass or are hit by a mob or arrow.
The effect increases in severity if the player is hit (injured) again.

</details>

# **Medical tourniquet**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

A medical tourniquet has the ability to stop bleeding.

</details>

# **Gloves**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

By putting gloves on the chest plate slot, you can break glass without risk of injury.

</details>
